inputs.label: Initial value y₀
inputs.businessContext: Value of y at initial time t₀

inputs.label: Coefficient a
inputs.businessContext: Growth (positive) or decay (negative) rate in dy/dt = a·y + b

inputs.label: Constant b
inputs.businessContext: Constant forcing term in dy/dt = a·y + b

inputs.label: Initial time t₀
inputs.businessContext: Time at which initial condition y₀ is given

inputs.label: Time t
inputs.businessContext: Time at which to compute y(t)

formulas.y: a !== 0 ? (y0 + b/a) * Math.exp(a * (t - t0)) - b/a : y0 + b * (t - t0)
